title: Pre-shipment compliance check
subtitle: See regulatory requirements, documents, and risk indicators before a shipment moves.
form.originLabel: Where are the goods coming from?
nextActions.title: Next Actions
nextActions.stopFlagWarning: STOP flag active — resolve trade restrictions before proceeding
nextActions.allComplete: All actions complete for this trade.
nextActions.canDownload: You can now download your compliance pack.
lcCta.documentsLookGood: Documents look good? Check your Letter of Credit next.
lcCta.prefillNote: Pre-fills commodity, HS code, origin, destination, and required documents from this lookup.
readiness.title: Readiness Score
duty.title: Duty Estimate
duty.swissTariffShort: Swiss agricultural tariffs are often specific (CHF/kg). Verify at tares.admin.ch.
duty.swissTariffLong: Swiss agricultural tariffs are often specific (CHF/kg) not ad valorem. TARES API provides exact rates — estimate may be indicative for food commodities. Verify at tares.admin.ch before quoting landed cost.
agoa.description: This origin qualifies under the African Growth and Opportunity Act for duty-free or reduced-tariff access to the US market. Ensure AGOA Certificate of Origin is prepared.
demurrage.basedOnReadiness: (based on your readiness score), a standard 20ft container could cost
eudr.completeMessage: Your EUDR due diligence statement has been completed for this trade.
eudr.requiredMessage: Additional requirement to ship legally and avoid penalties.
eudr.swissTitle: Swiss Due Diligence Act — Prepare EUDR-Equivalent Documentation
eudr.swissDescription: Switzerland has passed its own Due Diligence Act covering timber and minerals. Cocoa, coffee, and other EUDR commodities are expected to be added. Monitor FOEN/BAFU (bafu.admin.ch) for confirmation of scope and timeline. Prepare EUDR-equivalent documentation now — requirements will likely mirror the EU.
triggers.title: Regulatory Triggers
hazards.title: Known Hazards
stopFlags.title: STOP FLAGS — Trade Restrictions Apply
afcfta.eligible: Both countries are AfCFTA members — preferential treatment may apply
afcfta.notApplicable: Not applicable — destination is not an AfCFTA member
actions.title: Actions
actions.brokerNote: Use directly or share with a broker if you have one
twinlog.profileRequired: Complete your company profile to download TwinLog Trail records.
supplierEmail.subject: Subject: Required Export Documents — {{commodity}} (HS {{hsCode}}) from {{origin}} to {{destination}}
supplierEmail.intro: We are preparing a shipment of {{commodity}} (HS {{hsCode}}) from {{origin}} to {{destination}}. Please prepare the following documents:
supplierEmail.confirmAvailability: Please confirm availability and expected timeline for each document.
supplierWhatsapp.title: *Required Documents* - {{commodity}} (HS {{hsCode}})
watch.getNotified: Get notified when regulations change for {{commodity}} → {{destination}}
watch.limitDescription: You're watching 3 corridors (free limit). Upgrade to Pro to watch more.
template.loadingFrom: Loading from template: {{name}} — check the fields below and click Check compliance risk.
template.staleBanner: Showing saved results from {{date}}. Regulations may have changed.
template.saved: Template saved. Find it in My Templates.
template.savePrompt: Save this trade as a template for next time? It's free.
template.nameDescription: Give your template a name so you can find it later.
tokenModal.title: Insufficient Tokens
tokenModal.description: You need 5 tokens to run a compliance lookup, but you have {{balance}}. Purchase a token pack to continue.
leadCapture.title: Save this compliance check

leadCapture.privacyNotice: By submitting, you agree to our
leadCapture.successMessage: Thanks! We'll send regulatory updates for this corridor.
conversion.activateShield: Activate Shield to manage this shipment
conversion.activateDescription: Create a free account to save your results, run LC document checks, track supplier documents, and manage your shipment from a single dashboard.
conversion.tradeCreated: Trade created — your shipment is live
conversion.tradeDescription: Manage documents, run LC checks, track suppliers, and monitor compliance — all from your trade dashboard.
conversion.shieldDescription: Activate TapTrao Shield for full shipment protection — LC checks, document tracking, and late-document alerts until docking.
conversion.lcRejectionStat: ~30% of LC submissions are rejected on first presentation.
docReadiness.title: Document Readiness
docReadiness.subtitle: Upload documents to validate against requirements
actionHint.ipaffs: Submit at: ipaffs.co.uk — 24hrs before goods arrive
actionHint.customs: Provide HS code, origin, and CHED reference to your broker
actionHint.eudrGeo: GPS coordinates of production plot required
actionHint.iuu: Issued by flag state of fishing vessel — not the exporter
actionHint.flegt: Only available from VPA partner countries
commodities.title: Commodities
commodities.noTradesAll: Run your first compliance check to see it here.
newCheck.title: New Check
newCheck.subtitle: Choose a check type for your shipment. Each check generates a hash-chained audit record.
newCheck.complianceDesc: What regulations apply to your shipment? Get duty rates, document requirements, risk assessments, and readiness scores for any commodity corridor.
newCheck.lcDocDesc: Do your documents match your LC terms? Cross-check Letter of Credit terms against supplier documents using UCP 600 rules to catch discrepancies before bank presentation.
